title: lastreopsis hispida
intro: Lastreopsis hispida, also known as the hispid fern or hairy shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lastreopsis hispida include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastreopsis hispida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
